title: TargetsDependencyFragment
description: TargetsDependencyFragment: Dependency fragment used to define one or more Relations that terminate at the specified targets and use the IBHoMObject owning this fragment as the source.

Targets.description: Collection of Guids of entities that are targets for Relations where the IBHoMObject owning this fragment is the source.

Curves.description: Collection of ICurves used to represent the Relations.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
